SynchronousCommand.Description: Open lab firewall ICMP and WinRM
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Enable-PSRemoting -Force -SkipNetworkProfileCheck; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name='NestedVirt-ICMP-In' protocol=icmpv4:8,any dir=in action=allow remoteip=10.0.0.0/8; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name='NestedVirt-WinRM-In' protocol=tcp dir=in localport=5985 action=allow remoteip=10.0.0.0/8; Enable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'File and Printer Sharing'"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Set guest lab IP if DHCP missed
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ip='GUEST_IP'; $gw='BR_GATEWAY'; $nic=(Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' -and $_.Name -notmatch 'vEthernet' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($nic -and -not (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -eq $ip.Split('/')[0] })) { New-NetIPAddress -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex -IPAddress $ip.Split('/')[0] -PrefixLength 24 -DefaultGateway $gw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ($nic) { Set-DnsClientServerAddress -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex -ServerAddresses 1.1.1.1,1.0.0.1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Startup task: restore lab IP + DNS after Hyper-V reboots
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine:
powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$script='C:\ProgramData
ested-virtestore-lab-ip.ps1'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'C:\ProgramData
ested-virt' | Out-Null; @'
$ip=''GUEST_IP''; $gw=''BR_GATEWAY''; $dns=@(''1.1.1.1'',''1.0.0.1'')
$nic=Get-NetAdapter|?{$_.Status -eq ''Up'' -and ($_.Name -like ''*NestedVirt-Lab*'' -or ($_.Name -notmatch ''vEthernet'' -and $_.InterfaceDescription -notmatch ''Hyper-V''))}|select -First 1
if($nic -and -not (Get-NetIPAddress -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex -AddressFamily IPv4|?{$_.IPAddress -eq $ip})){New-NetIPAddress -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex -IPAddress $ip -PrefixLength 24 -DefaultGateway $gw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}
if($nic){Set-DnsClientServerAddress -InterfaceIndex $nic.ifIndex -ServerAddresses $dns -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}
'@ | Set-Content $script; schtasks /Create /TN NestedVirtRestoreLabIp /SC ONSTART /RU SYSTEM /RL HIGHEST /TR "powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $script" /F"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Defer Hyper-V to enable-hyperv-nested-host.ps1 after KVM nested XML fix
